catalog_row.Paper: Money And Monetary Policy In The Eurozone: An Empirical Analysis During Crises
catalog_row.ModelType: log-linearized New Keynesian DSGE with nonseparable money utility
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: nonseparable consumption-money preferences; money demand; flexible-price output and money; Calvo Phillips curve; smoothed Taylor rule; crisis-window Bayesian estimation
catalog_row.RawPDF: raw/mmb_papers/Money And Monetary Policy In The Eurozone- An Empirical Analysis During Crises.pdf

status_row.paper_title: Money And Monetary Policy In The Eurozone: An Empirical Analysis During Crises
status_row.raw_pdf_path: raw/mmb_papers/Money And Monetary Policy In The Eurozone- An Empirical Analysis During Crises.pdf
status_row.notes: First-pass extraction from MinerU Markdown; model equations rely partly on implementation cross-check because the Online Appendix is absent locally; raw PDF existence checked but PDF body not opened; Dynare not run; shared indexes not edited.

validation.command: git diff --check --no-index /dev/null for each new file in data/model_archive/mmb_derivations/EA_BF17
check English has all eight required sections
check English and Chinese F-number counts match
validation.details: 22 total F-number references in each file; 11 unique equation numbers, F1-F11

unresolved_issues: Online Appendix model equations are not present in the primary Markdown or a local appendix normalization file.
Coefficient formulas in the reduced equations require source-level review.
Taylor-rule money term is described in source prose but commented out in the implementation cross-check.
Runtime validation was intentionally not performed.
